task: STAFF-001 — Staff login and branch-scoped access
why: First protected app API route in the project. Adds requireStaff Express middleware + resolveBranchScope + assertBranchScope authz primitives, a canary GET /api/staff/me route, a schema migration (nullable assigned_branch_id FK), and a role-aware mobile root gate. The middleware IS the trust boundary that determines who may reach staff data. Sets the authz pattern all future STAFF-002/003/004 routes reuse.
workDescription: Add assigned_branch_id to users; requireStaff/resolveBranchScope/assertBranchScope in packages/api/src/lib/require-staff.ts; canary GET /api/staff/me; role-aware (staff) mobile shell + root gate; designed staff dashboard shell fetching the auth-gated /api/staff/me.
